problem id: 118b6643
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10111100 -> 00000101
  01010100 -> 00000010
  00101000 -> 00000001
  01100010 -> 10000011
  01101101 -> 01000011
  10110110 -> 10000101
  10010011 -> 11000100
  11001110 -> 10000110
  11011000 -> 00000110
  00111100 -> 00000001

query: 10011000
predicted answer: 00000100
